tool_calls.input:
{"code":"(def unresolved-issues (sentry_issues {:status "unresolved"}))
(def top-issue (max-key :count unresolved-issues))
(def title (:title top-issue))
(insert! :emails {:to_addr "oncall@acme.io" :subject "Top error" :body title})
{:sent title}"}
